transcript.clean_text: for the fourth time down the years the tour de france began in the city of brest in the north west of france and in the region of brittany beginning impressed but heading to london for a first ever finish in the small town 197.8 kilometers for stage one more than two and a half thousand meters of climbing and six categorized climbs so building up to a brand new uphill finish at the la fosolu in london the tour de france began with plenty of attacks straight from the off fresh legs plenty of ambition and everybody looking to be up the road finally a six-man group did get up the road bon amor the local rider was joined by fanpopple rodriguez perez skelling and swift and behind they were never really given more than three minutes 40 seconds a real fight for the first king of the mountains jersey took a different turn when edith schelling attacked with 85 kilometers to go the rest of the breakaway would be swallowed up as he went away and took that king of the mountains jersey not a bad result on debut for the young dutchman who was having some fun borah hansgroh taking their first prize of this tour peter sagan their sprinter would be involved in the fight for the sprint points behind keller buen taking most of the rest of those and the moment when skelling knew he would be in the king of the mountains jersey was a special one on the day the first of two horror moments of the day however came when a spectator sign took down tony martin and most of the rest of the peloton the first of two back crashes forced yeshua sutton to abandon the tour de france those who'd missed out waited for the rest to rejoin tony martin not in a good way but thankfully back on his bike into the final 30 kilometers in the race resumed at the front the current quickstep wanting to take it up julian anna philippe one of the favorites found a pool for not with them but a lot more riders taken down in a second crash well inside the final few kilometers a crash that would undoubtedly condition the tour de france for a lot of teams chris froome after going through agony to get back to this level and return to the tour de france was also down but did finish the stage under the final climb and dries davenines would put in a dig to lead out his mate but julian allah philippe the world champion would attacked with well over two kilometers to go he had a gap and continue to pull pia lator went after him for total energy what fernand briefly tried roglich as well with pogachar but nobody could get near julian alaphilippe proving that yellow was once again his favorite color of the rainbow the world champions jersey will be exchanged for a yellow jersey at the julian anna philippe returned to the tour de france to win stage one second place winner michael matthews third place and bonus seconds to primary glitch but the winner and first leader ala philippe the world champ delight for ala philippe just days after becoming a father winning stage one a top ten that include the likes of thomas pogatcha the defending champion and roglic should finish second the year before a yellow jersey as france dares to dream junior philippe beginning the tour de france in the yellow jersey will he still be wearing it when we get to paris aleppo at the top at the start of course the jersey could change hands in the coming days with more uphill unpredictable finishes to come and all that starts on stage two leaving perhaps gerecke on the coast and heading to murder slightly shorter distance at 183.5 kilometers but more king of the mountains climbs bonus seconds and yet another uphill finish for the punchers or who knows the gc riders too many riders will be counting the cost after day one of the tour de france julian anna philippe will be taking in the adulation he wins stage one and france dares to dream
